description: Go program importing golang.org/x/text v0.3.7 but only using cases.Title with language.English constant, never calling the vulnerable language.Parse() function. CVE-2022-32149 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Only cases.Title(language.English) is called. language.Parse() is never invoked anywhere in source. The language package is imported but only for the English constant.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable function Parse() is never called. Only language.English (a constant) and cases.Title() are used, neither of which trigger the ReDoS vulnerability.
